meta.title: Lev Commune Digest Meta
meta.description: A shareable status page for the completed Lev Commune vision and roadmap digestion loop.

props.title: Lev Commune Digest
props.subtitle: The 105-page Commune/Game source is now captured, mapped, and carved into low-blast next work.

props.content: This is the operator-facing checkpoint: what was digested, what changed, what stayed bounded, and which primitives now carry the roadmap pressure.

props.label: Decision Boundary
props.title: What moved vs. what stayed locked
Moved Forward
props.content: The source is now decomposed into a source map, primitive map, prior-art map, design projection, workshop POC, two follow-up task contracts, and receipts.

props.title: Still Locked
props.content: Canonical roadmap rewrites, top-level mesh CLI implementation, core runtime changes, AgentLease policy, and globe/world UI implementation remain high-blast decisions.

props.title: 1. Inbox
props.content: The correct Shared Lev Commune/Game PDF moved into docs/_inbox and was converted to markdown.

props.title: 2. Zero-loss Capture
props.content: The page-level capture preserved the full 105-page decomposition and source hashes.

props.title: 3. Primitive Map
props.content: Graph, mesh, FlowMind, Exec, Poly, AgentLease, UI, world model, and accounting lanes were mapped to existing surfaces.

props.title: 4. Proposed Tasks
props.content: Low-blast follow-ups were cut for AgentLease/auth-material and top-level mesh command ownership.

props.title: 5. Verified Close
props.content: YAML, task contracts, source map, primitive references, design anchors, and diff whitespace checks passed.

props.label: Primitive Pressure
props.title: What the source now demands from Lev

rows.role: Canonical state, claims, evidence, memory, contribution.
rows.current: core/graph, core/memory, graph adapter plugins, unified graph designs.
rows.next: Import Commune/Game claims into graph vocabulary before UI work.

rows.role: One-hop route, proof, capability, receipt, overlay exchange.
rows.current: poly-protocol mesh draft, avatar-mesh captures, mesh protocol spikes.
rows.next: Keep command ownership top-level: lev mesh inspect/route/invoke.

rows.role: Workflow and cognitive authoring language for tick programs.
rows.current: core/flowmind, FlowMind language specs, tmux proof matrix.
rows.next: Read lowering refs and emit ticks; do not own Poly steering refs.

rows.role: Task, envelope, runtime, wireframe, receipt, proof spine.
rows.next: Every implementation task stays behind DNA, execution YAML, and receipts.

rows.current: poly-protocol, poly-compiler, poly runtime, registry split tasks.
rows.next: Separate protocol nouns, compiler adapters, runtime consumers, and mesh sibling projection.

rows.role: Time-bound, scope-bound grants for PII, keys, tools, and sensitive material.
rows.current: agentguard notes, vault, guardrails, architecture validation POCs.
rows.next: Design issuer, subject, resource, scope, TTL, revocation, audit, and receipt binding.

rows.role: Graph-backed interface and probe surface, not a separate MVP product.
rows.current: Lev Globe spec, GenUI, now renderer, AgentPing surfaces.
rows.next: Fold in only where graph plumbing needs spatial or temporal projection.

rows.role: Contribution graph, delayed accounting, payout, future mesh economy.
rows.current: marketplace reports, platforms plugins, mesh economy notes.
rows.next: Receipt/accounting projection only until idempotent release and trust gates exist.

props.title: Receipt Manifest
props.content: 15 receipt entries, including follow-up design receipts.

rows.why: Would move top-level product truth from source digestion into project authority.
rows.ready: Use the design projection as input to an explicit roadmap-edit task.

rows.why: Command ownership affects protocol/runtime boundaries and user-facing CLI shape.
Security, privacy, revocation, and receipt semantics are core policy.
The globe is salient but must be graph-backed plumbing, not a standalone product detour.
rows.ready: Treat it as a UI projection after graph and proof-spine readiness.

props.title: Lev Commune MVP Boundary
props.content:
flowchart LR
  Source["Commune/Game PDF\n105 pages"] --> Capture["Zero-loss capture"]
  Capture --> Map["Source + primitive maps"]
  Map --> Design["Design projection"]
  Design --> Tasks["Low-blast follow-up tasks"]
  Graph["Graph"] --> Mesh["Mesh"]
  Poly["Poly protocol/compiler/runtime"] --> Mesh
  FlowMind["FlowMind ticks"] --> Exec["Exec / run fabric"]
  Mesh --> Exec
  AgentLease["AgentLease auth material"] --> Mesh
  Exec --> Receipts["Tasks + receipts"]
  Tasks --> Receipts
  Globe["Globe/world UI"] -. graph-backed projection .-> Graph
  Settlement["Settlement"] -. out of MVP .-> Receipts
